title: Spanforge HITLPayload
description: RFC-0001 — Payload for hitl.* (Human-in-the-Loop) events. Captures human oversight decisions for EU AI Act Art. 14 mandatory human oversight on high-risk AI systems. Event types: hitl.queued, hitl.reviewed, hitl.escalated, hitl.timeout.

HITLPayload.title: HITLPayload
HITLPayload.description: Payload for hitl.queued, hitl.reviewed, hitl.escalated, and hitl.timeout events. Captures human-in-the-loop review decisions for GDPR Art. 22 and EU AI Act Art. 14 / Annex IV.5 compliance.

decision_id.description: Identifier of the AI decision under review.

agent_id.description: Agent that produced the decision requiring review.

reason.description: Reason for the review outcome or escalation.

sla_seconds.description: Review SLA in seconds. Default 3600 (1 hour).

queued_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the decision was queued for review.

resolved_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the review was completed.

confidence.description: Agent's confidence score on the original decision.
